title: galium granulatum
intro: Galium granulatum, also known as the Himalayan bedstraw, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Galium granulatum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues and menstrual problems. Herbal preparations of Galium granulatum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to support overall health and well-being.
